summary: From Entrance A, continue through check-in, security, passport control, and the international concourse before taking the escalator down to Toilet B.

instructions.text: From Entrance A, pass check-in counters 11–30 and 31–50, take the connecting corridor to counters 51–60, continue past counters 61–80, then turn left until reaching the security checkpoint.
warnings: Prepare your boarding pass before the security gates.

instructions.text: After security, turn right toward Passport control leading to the international concourse corridor.
warnings: Open passport to identity page and keep boarding pass visible.

instructions.text: Continue through the international corridor past Duty Free C, Gates 15, 14, and 13, then follow the concourse to the escalator for the lower level.

Take the escalator down to floor -1, continue through the lower concourse past Restaurant E.
You have arrived at Toilet B.
